Manager.description: The SONiC OEM extension for the Manager resource.
Manager.longDescription: This object shall contain SONiC-specific properties added to the standard Redfish Manager resource as an OEM extension.

RackManager.description: The link to the SONiC rack-manager communication sub-resource.

RackManager.longDescription: This resource shall expose inbound actions through which a rack manager pushes structured alerts and periodic telemetry to the switch BMC.

Actions.description: The available actions for this resource.
Actions.longDescription: This property shall contain the available actions for this resource.

SubmitAlert.description: Submits structured alert data from a rack manager to the switch BMC.
SubmitAlert.longDescription: This action shall submit a set of structured alert entries from a rack manager to the switch BMC.  Per DMTF action idiom this definition serves two roles: the `parameters` block describes the POST request body (clients sending POSTs should look there); the `properties` block (target, title) describes how the action is advertised on GET of the parent resource.

Alerts.description: Alert entries keyed by alert type name.
Alerts.longDescription: Required.  See AlertsByType for the map shape; the alert type keys are vendor-defined (for example, FlowRateDeviation, LeakDetected) and are not enumerated by this schema.

AlertsByType.description: Map of alert type name to AlertEntry.
AlertsByType.longDescription: This object shall be a map whose keys are vendor-defined alert type names (for example, FlowRateDeviation, LeakDetected) and whose values conform to AlertEntry.  The set of legal keys is intentionally open so that new alert types can be introduced without a schema version bump.

AlertEntry.longDescription: Each entry shall include Severity and RscmPosition.  Additional properties beyond these are alert-type specific and shall be passed through to the BMC for storage.

RscmPosition.description: RSCM position identifier of the reporting device.

SubmitTelemetry.description: Submits periodic telemetry and alarm data from a rack manager to the switch BMC.
SubmitTelemetry.longDescription: This action shall submit a periodic telemetry payload from a rack manager to the switch BMC.  Per DMTF action idiom this definition serves two roles: the `parameters` block describes the POST request body; the `properties` block (target, title) describes how the action is advertised on GET of the parent resource.

Alarms.description: Container for alarm and sensor telemetry data.
Alarms.longDescription: The value of this parameter shall conform to Alarms.  Receivers shall pass unknown scalar properties through to the BMC for storage.

Alarms.description: Container for alarm and sensor telemetry submitted by a rack manager.
Alarms.longDescription: This object may include additional properties beyond those listed here.

ConfigFileCorrupted.description: Indicates whether the configuration file is corrupted.

EnergyValveActive.description: Indicates whether the energy valve is active.

EnergyValvePresent.description: Indicates whether the energy valve is present.

ErrorState.description: Error state code reported by the rack manager.

FlowrateSensorActive.description: Indicates whether the flow-rate sensor is active.

PressureSensorActive.description: Indicates whether the pressure sensor is active.

RscmPosition.description: RSCM position identifier of the reporting device.

TemperatureSensorActive.description: Indicates whether the temperature sensor is active.

Deviation.description: A scalar deviation reading paired with a severity.
Deviation.longDescription: This object shall describe a single deviation reading, common to flow-rate, inlet-temperature, and liquid-pressure conditions.  Value is the measured quantity in vendor-defined units; Severity classifies the deviation.

Value.description: Measured value of the deviating quantity.

LeakDetected.longDescription: This object shall describe the leak-detection state reported by the rack manager.

LeakDetected.description: Indicates whether a leak has been detected.

LeakRopeBreak.description: Indicates whether the leak-detection rope is broken.

SonicSeverity.description: Severity classification used by SONiC OEM alert and telemetry payloads.
SonicSeverity.longDescription: This string enumeration shall classify the severity of an alert or telemetry deviation reported by the rack manager.  The values are SONiC-specific and do not map one-to-one to the DMTF Health enumeration; receivers shall accept and store the value verbatim.

enumDescriptions.Normal: No abnormal condition; the reported value is within expected bounds.
enumDescriptions.Minor: Degraded condition; service continues without immediate intervention.
enumDescriptions.Major: Service-impacting condition; operator intervention is expected.
enumDescriptions.Critical: Service-affecting condition; immediate intervention is required.

title: #SonicManager.v1_0_0.Manager
